description: Add a notification center with persisted read state and list actions.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored across sessions so unread and read items stay consistent after refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification persistence stores read or unread state for each notification.
Stored read state persists across sessions for the same user.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list so I can notice updates and review them in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread badge reflects current unread notification count.
Notification list opens and shows recent notifications with read-state styling.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notifications read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so the list reflects what I have handled already.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can mark a notification read or unread from the notification list.
Read-state updates persist immediately after the action completes.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notification list by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread or handled updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list offers all, unread, and read filter options.
Applying a filter updates the list to only matching notifications.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so handled updates leave the notification center.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can clear all read notifications from notification center controls.
Unread notifications remain after clear completes.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
